changes: Emoji layer support: add an animated emoji to all 3 ITR aspect-ratio comps per iteration — each iteration can use a different emoji
Built-in emoji library of 166 animated GIFs ships with the extension
Emoji picker: in-panel thumbnail grid, click to select per-iteration emoji
Emoji loop: time remapping + loopOut("cycle") so the emoji plays for the full comp duration
Project panel is automatically cleaned and organised before each collect (ITR and VAR)
Render comps are protected from being moved or deleted during the clean pass
VAR mode: create 5 named project variants from a single base .aep — each variant gets its own collected folder, 3 PNG renders, and rendered videos
VAR mode: switch to the VAR tab, name your 5 variants, assign video/color/font values per iteration, and click Run VAR
VAR mode: project panel is automatically cleaned and organised before each collect (canonical Stuff / 01_Video / 02_Images / … structure)
VAR mode: detailed run log shows every step — comp renaming, media import, apply, render, collect
Per-iteration preview: click any iteration number to instantly preview that iteration in AE (Ctrl+Z to undo)
Changelog button (ℹ) shows release history directly in the panel
Removed Test Apply button — iteration preview replaces it
Video/footage layer support: flip horizontal, black & white, tint with adjustable amount, hue shift
Video effect presets: Warm Tints, Cool Tints, Hue Variants, Mirror Mix
Preset panel filters by layer type (color vs video) automatically
Fixed tint amount — default 50% instead of 100%
Stroke color support for shape layers
Stroke grouped inside the same card as fill with a visual divider
Fixed: same-for-all checkbox no longer copies fill color to stroke rows
Fixed: stroke row inputs now found correctly across the whole document
Color preset system with built-in library (12 palettes)
User presets saved to ~/Library/Application Support/AE Iterations/user-presets.json
User presets survive extension updates
UI redesign: dark near-black theme, olive accent, pill buttons
Auto-update via GitHub releases with one-click install
Per-row sample button captures current AE layer values
Dialog suppression during script execution
All output folders placed inside a GD subfolder
Mixed shape + text layer selection
Font inputs shown automatically for text layers
Layer type auto-detected on refresh
